name: Peach Crumble
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Peaches, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peach slices in an 8-inch round or square microwave-safe dish. Stir in lemon juice and toss lightly.
2. Cut butter into flour in a medium mixing bowl until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
3. Stir in sugars, oats, cinnamon, nutmeg, and walnuts.
4. Sprinkle over peaches.
5. Microwave on high (100% power) until fruit is tender, 12 to 14 minutes, rotating the dish once.
or bake in oven at 350°F for 20 minutes.
